title: Luscious Greek Zucchini Pastitsio
description: A salty, velvety comfort dish featuring ginger paste and a low-carb twist on traditional pastitsio.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat and sauté diced onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon.
Stir in minced garlic, ginger paste, tomato sauce, oregano, and cinnamon, then simmer for 10 minutes.
Whisk the beaten egg into the sauce, then let it cool slightly.
Toss zucchini slices with a pinch of salt and almond flour, then spread them in a greased baking dish.
Spoon the beef-egg sauce over the zucchini layer and smooth the top.
Sprinkle shredded mozzarella and grated parmesan evenly.
Bake for 25 minutes until the top is golden and bubbly, then let rest 5 minutes before serving.
